events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: Rebar placement commercial project, rough-complete. Photos show several completed pieces, but area count and remaining scope not listed. Submitted package doesn't include quantity takeoff needed to score checkpoint. Reference ACI 318, ACI 117, placing drawings.

We need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since no quantity takeoff, cannot verify percent complete or if all rebar placed per drawings. Need more info. But also maybe component conditions none flagged. Decision likely needs_more_info because missing quantity takeoff/area count. Risk maybe medium because incomplete documentation could hide non-compliance. Work stage rough-complete. percent_complete unknown maybe 0? Could estimate 0 because cannot score. But maybe set percent_complete to null? Schema says 0. Could set 0 if unknown. value 0. Findings: missing quantity takeoff, cannot verify scope completeness. Actions: submit quantity takeoff and area count, reconcile with placing drawings, verify before inspection. References: ACI 318, ACI 117, placing drawings.

Need ensure JSON valid. No prose.
